nodes.title: Entry point
nodes.purpose: The guide front controller or a tool (generator, validator, CLI) that needs the model and asks the loader for it.

files.reason: The representative caller — every guide request constructs Content and calls load().

nodes.title: Content files (.vibekb/)
nodes.purpose: The record and manifest files on disk — Markdown with front matter, and small JSON — parsed into structured metadata plus rendered HTML.

files.reason: Parses each record's front-matter block without a YAML dependency.
Renders the record body with a pragmatic, escaping Markdown subset.

nodes.title: Loader (Content::load)
nodes.purpose: Reads the files, parses them, resolves relationships (dependents, memory and file back-links), and assembles the keyed in-memory model — confining all filesystem access to the content root.

files.reason: load() is the pipeline; isInsideRoot() enforces the content-root confinement.

nodes.title: In-memory model
nodes.purpose: The resolved, queryable model: functionality keyed by id, resolved relationships, normalised diagram topology, and provenance — read by the templates and the search index.

files.reason: Holds the loaded records and exposes the accessors templates use.

nodes.title: Validation (validate())
nodes.purpose: Checks required fields, controlled vocabularies, resolvable references, diagram assets, and the explainable-diagram contract, accumulating errors and warnings.

files.reason: validate() and validateTopology() produce the issue list.

nodes.title: Reference view & CI
nodes.purpose: Where the issue list surfaces — the guide's Reference view for humans and `tools/validate.php` for CI, which exits non-zero on any error.

files.reason: Renders the same issues the CI validator reports.

edges.label: delegates loading to
edges.explanation: The entry point constructs Content and delegates reading and assembling the model to load().

edges.label: reads & parses
edges.explanation: The loader reads each record and manifest and parses it via the front-matter and Markdown utilities, refusing any path outside the content root.

files.reason: Parses the front matter of each file read.

edges.label: creates
edges.explanation: The loader assembles the parsed records into the keyed, relationship-resolved in-memory model.

files.reason: Builds the model arrays and resolves reverse links.

edges.label: calls
edges.explanation: After assembling the model, load() calls validate() so problems are found at load time, not at render time.

files.reason: load() invokes validate() as its final step.

edges.label: emits issues to
edges.explanation: Validation emits an error/warning list consumed by the guide's Reference view and by the CI validator.

files.reason: Displays the emitted issues in the guide.
